findings.location: s4 — 対話形式で生成を実行する場合
findings.description: The interactive execution example (bash code block) is omitted. The source contains a concrete terminal session showing the exact prompts displayed to the user ('処理方式名を入力して下さい。（例：画面オンライン）', '環境名を入力して下さい。（例：本番環境）'), sample inputs, and the expected 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' / 'Total time: 18 seconds' output. This demonstrates the actual interactive workflow and helps users know what to expect at runtime.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines under '対話形式で生成を実行する場合': bash code block showing the `clean:` / `generate-interactive:` / `[input]` prompts, user inputs '画面オンライン' and '本番環境', and the 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL\nTotal time: 18 seconds' result.
